description: A site manager needs to schedule a concrete pour for the building's foundation and coordinate the required third-party slump test.

nodes.task_description: Contact the concrete supplier to schedule a delivery of 50 cubic yards for a specific date and time.

expected_outcome.value: A concrete delivery is successfully scheduled.

nodes.task_description: Contact the third-party testing agency to schedule a technician to be on-site to perform slump tests during the pour.

expected_outcome.value: A testing technician is successfully booked for the same date and time.
